domain.title: Jira site domain
domain.description: The subdomain of your Jira Cloud site. Example: for https://mycompany.atlassian.net, enter 'mycompany'.

email.title: Atlassian account email
email.description: Email address of the Atlassian account that owns the API token.

apiToken.title: Atlassian API token
apiToken.description: Atlassian API token for Jira Cloud. Combined with your email to form the Basic auth header.
